ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Stsatus Hearing On Filing The Final Inventory And Appraisal

Petition For Order Under California Probate Code 850 And To Disinherit Respondent Under California Probate Code 259 (Recovery Of Real Property, Constructive Trust, And Disinheritance For Elder Financial Abuse)
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Jul-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amir Taghizad appeared via zoom (petitioner).
Ramin Mozaffer appeared via zoom for Miriam Taghizad.

Discussion was held regarding the service issues, that an ex parte is on file, that the Court suggested refiling an ex parte application. The matters are continued to July 21, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bloom. Not reported.

Petitioner'S Request For Order Compelling Production Of Estate Records
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Under California Probate Code 850 And To Disinherit Respondent Under California Probate Code 259 (Recovery Of Real Property, Constructive Trust, And Disinheritance For Elder Financial Abuse)
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Continued To May-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Petitioner Amir Taghizad, Jr. appearing in pro per.(IN PERSON).

Court determines that the Petition is verified, but Court needs a proposed order.
Court is not prepared to grant Ex parte application for alternate service. Petition must be personally served.

Court takes Petitioner's request for Order Compelling Production of Estate Records OFF CALENDAR.

Petition for Order under California Probate Code 850, et. al. is continued to allow Petitioner to hire a professional to assist with personal service.

Court orders matter continued to May-26-2026 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: S. Monroe. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

Off Calendar Nov-04-2025 Continued To Dec-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Petition
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amir Sabino Taghizad Jr. appeared in person (pro per).

Mr. Taghizad stated that he filed a declaration to clear the examiner's notes, and stated that he can be bonded. The matter is taken under submission.

Status of Petition is set for July 23 , 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-20-2025 Continued To Jun-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amir Taghizad Jr appeared in person (pro per) (petitioner).

Mr. Taghizad stated that his father left the US in 2019 and moved back to Iran, that he was estranged from his father, that his father lived in Chico and San Francisco, and that his father purchased a home under a trust and used his name. He also stated that his father filed for divorce in San Francisco County and that he passed away on March 28, 2025. The Court stated that there were many procedural issues that need to be addressed. The matter is continued to June 25, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.
